examples: Infection with head lice is no reflection on personal hygiene.
For a shirt verminously busy, yon soldier tore from his throat with oaths. Godhead might shrink at, but not the lice.
His clothes were crawling with lice.
Nadareski peered into the birds' ears, then spread their wings to check for lice.
The three-year-old, called Maggie, was found underweight, with lice, mange and signs of serious neglect.
